author: LeonYew-Ley
description: Embed interactive HTML files, URLs, or inline HTML as Claude-style sandboxed artifact cards inside notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: LeonYew-Ley
manifest.description: Embed interactive HTML files, URLs, or inline HTML as Claude-style sandboxed artifact cards inside notes.
manifest.name: Artifact Embed

name: Artifact Embed

releases.author: LeonYew-Ley
releases.description:
## 0.2.0

### Bug fixes
- **Live Preview rendering**: artifact iframes sometimes stayed blank on file-open until the user scrolled to the bottom of the note. Root cause was a CM6 lazy-parsing quirk: `registerMarkdownCodeBlockProcessor` only fires once the block's closing fence has been parsed, and for tall artifact blocks CM6 may parse only the first few lines on file-open and never reach the end. The plugin now forces a full-document parse on file-open via `ensureSyntaxTree` from `@codemirror/language`. ([forum thread](https://forum.obsidian.md/t/long-markdown-code-block-not-fully-loaded-in-live-preview/50647))

### Performance
- ThemeBridge scans `getComputedStyle(body)` with a prefix allowlist instead of walking every `cssRules` tree (themes + snippets can produce tens of thousands of rules)
- Skip iframe `srcdoc` reassignment when content is byte-identical
- Short-circuit processor re-invocations on the same element with the same source via `el.dataset.artifactSig`
- Defer the iframe load until it's attached to the live DOM, avoiding lost srcdoc on detached iframes

### New
- Bundled `artifact-embed` Claude Code Skill for generating self-contained, theme-aware HTML artifacts that drop into the ` ```artifact ` code block

### Install (manual)
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` below
2. Drop into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/artifact-embed/`
3. Reload Obsidian → Settings → Community plugins → enable **Artifact Embed**

releases.author: LeonYew-Ley
releases.description:
## 0.1.0 — Initial release

  First public release of **Artifact Embed**.

  ### Features
  - Single ````artifact``` code block syntax: auto-detects vault path,
   external URL, or inline HTML
  - Sandboxed `<iframe sandbox="allow-scripts">` (no same-origin
  access)
  - Inherits Obsidian CSS variables for theme-aware rendering
  - Card chrome with reload / open-externally / copy-source toolbar
  - Works in Reading mode and Live Preview
  - Optional per-block `height` / `title` directives

  ### Install (manual)
  1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` below
  2. Drop into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/artifact-embed/`
  3. Reload Obsidian → Settings → Community plugins → enable
  **Artifact Embed**
